offer: For insurance fraud investigators processing 10–20 claims/month, inefficient identification of fraud causes delayed investigations. We provide fraud pattern analysis instead of manual review of claims data.
problem: Identifying fraudulent claims in a timely manner
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance fraud investigators
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to insurance fraud investigators with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among investigators
try_it: Let users try fraud pattern reporting and dashboard for 1-3 claims
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of the manual-first workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing claims data
